title: State can't deny aid to child homes while funding Ladki Bahin Yojana: Bombay High Court
description: The Bombay High Court on Thursday observed that Maharashtra government cannot deny financial aid to institutions caring for vulnerable children while at the same time extending assistance to women under welfare schemes like the Ladki Bahin Yojana [Yuvraj Bhole & Ors v. State of Maharashtra & Ors]Such disparity would be Constitutional untenable, the Aurangabad bench of the High Court opined.
